recommendations.title: The Long Goodbye
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Hollywood, Detective Philip Marlowe tries to help a friend who is accused of murdering his wife.

recommendations.title: The Player
recommendations.overview: A Hollywood studio executive is being sent death threats by a writer whose script he rejected - but which one?

recommendations.title: A Prairie Home Companion
recommendations.overview: A look at what goes on backstage during the last broadcast of America's most celebrated radio show, where singing cowboys Dusty and Lefty, a country music siren, and a host of others hold court.

recommendations.title: Gosford Park
recommendations.overview: In 1930s England, a group of pretentious rich and famous gather together for a weekend of relaxation at a hunting resort. But when a murder occurs, each one of these interesting characters becomes a suspect.

recommendations.title: The Company
recommendations.overview: Ensemble drama centered around a group of ballet dancers, with a focus on one young dancer who's poised to become a principal performer.

recommendations.title: McCabe & Mrs. Miller
recommendations.overview: A gambler and a prostitute become thriving business partners in a remote Old West mining town until a large corporation arrives on the scene.

recommendations.title: 3 Women
recommendations.overview: Two co-workers, one a vain woman and the other an awkward teenager, share an increasingly bizarre relationship after becoming roommates.

recommendations.title: Short Cuts
recommendations.overview: Many loosely connected characters cross paths in this film, based on the stories of Raymond Carver. Waitress Doreen Piggot accidentally runs into a boy with her car. Soon after walking away, the child lapses into a coma. While at the hospital, the bo

recommendations.title: Cookie's Fortune
recommendations.overview: Conflict arises in the small town of Holly Springs when an old woman's death causes a variety of reactions among family and friends.

recommendations.title: The Gingerbread Man
recommendations.overview: A successful Savannah defense attorney gets romantically involved with a sexy, mysterious waitress troubled by psychopaths and dark family secrets.
